step_rationale: Leukocyte adhesion molecule driving monocyte/macrophage recruitment; reperfusion injury mediator.
mechanism: VAP-1 promotes leukocyte recruitment to inflamed endothelium and amplifies reperfusion injury in acute MI.

references.title: Vascular adhesion protein-1, intercellular adhesion molecule-1 and P-selectin mediate leukocyte binding to ischemic heart in humans.
references.journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
